## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Impressions increased significantly, clicks held steady; benchmark-related searches driving traffic](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [CTAs being integrated into published articles and future content](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Technical SEO health check planned for coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Exploring ways to track LLM referral traffic and optimize for AI search engines](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and SEO Strategy

  - [Impressions increased significantly, while clicks held steady](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Benchmark-related searches (e.g., "AI reasoning benchmark") driving high traffic](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Top-performing pages: best benchmarks, testing AI agents, evaluating AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Strategy: Slating some existing content for rewrites to better optimize for benchmark-related searches](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Exploring potential topic cluster around "AI reasoning benchmark"](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Content Updates and Workflow

  - [Inline CTAs added to published articles; future articles to include CTAs from the start](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Backlog of higher-quality articles awaiting review; expected to boost clicks once published](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Rewriting older content (e.g., WordScore page) alongside creating new articles](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Suggestion: Flag articles needing images/code snippets during rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Considering workflow addition: Design images for newly published articles](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)

### LLM and AI Search Optimization

  - [Exploring ways to track referral traffic from AI search engines (e.g., OpenAI, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Optimization strategies:](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
    1.  Diverse online presence (review sites, video content)
    2.  Creating high-quality, query-fulfilling content (similar to featured snippet optimization)
    3.  Strengthening presence across various platforms

### Technical SEO and Website Updates

  - [Planning technical SEO health check in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

  - [Further website updates planned for March/April](https://fathom.video/share/j1m3_upM5GiDHCN4tA_qjv7PkQ3g1ix6?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
